---
id: secret-upsert
title: "Upsert an application secret"
description: "Upsert an application secret. Requires administrator level privileges to the app."

hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Upsert an application secret"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/secrets/{secret-name}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>

:::caution[deprecated]

This endpoint has been deprecated and may be replaced or removed in future versions of the API.

:::

Upsert an application secret. Requires administrator level privileges to the app.
